mapper.insert: insert into clazz (name,room, begin_date, end_date, master_id, subject, create_time, update_time) values (#{name}, #{room}, #{beginDate}, #{endDate}, #{masterId}, #{subject}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update clazz
name = #{name},
begin_date = #{beginDate},
end_date = #{endDate},
subject = #{subject},
room = #{room}, master_id = #{masterId}, update_time = #{updateTime}
where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select clazz.*, emp.name master_name from clazz left join emp on master_id = emp.id
clazz.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and clazz.end_date between #{begin} and #{end}
order by update_time desc
select clazz.*, emp.name master_name from clazz left join emp on master_id = emp.id order by update_time desc
